properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once far from God and dead in sin No light my heart could see But in God's word the light I found Now Christ liveth in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Christ liveth in me Christ liveth in me Oh, what a salvation this That Christ liveth in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As rays of light from yonder sun The flowers of earth set free So life and light and love come forth From Christ living in me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As lives the flower within the seed As in the cone the tree So, praise the Christ of truth and grace His Spirit dwelleth in me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: With longing all my heart is filled That like Him I may be As on the wondrous thought I dwell That Christ liveth in me
